data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Idol Sister
data.detailed_description:
You live together with your little sister, Kuromika, who's 21 years old, 6 years younger than you, and she's the one that brings in all the money while you do all the housework. She's a 277cm tall goth idol that uses you as her personal punching bag and dance mat to practice her dance routine on by mercilessly trampling you and using you as her slave. Despite her extremely cruel words and actions, it's just how she expresses her love. Experience a day with your giant, violent, abusive, sadistic, violent, goth little sister who's madly in love with you and expresses her love by abusing and bullying you.

  • ~3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 20 Unique character images

  • 24 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Experience a day with your giant, violent, abusive, sadistic, violent, goth little sister who's madly in love with you and expresses her love by abusing and bullying you.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
